nasb.text: and the sign or the wonder comes true, concerning which he spoke to you, saying, ‘Let us go after other gods (whom you have not known) and let us serve them,’

esv.text: and the sign or wonder that he tells you comes to pass, and if he says, ‘Let us go after other gods,’ which you have not known, ‘and let us serve them,’

cnv.text: 他告訴你的神蹟和奇事應驗了，以致他對你說：‘我們去隨從別的、你不認識的神，事奉他們吧。’

ccb.text: 劝你们随从、供奉素不认识的神明，即使他们显的神迹奇事应验了，
